business_problem: Identify and revoke orphaned privileged access held by terminated or inactive employees to satisfy SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria.

sailpoint_search_queries.query_name: Inactive Identities with Standing Admin Privileges
sailpoint_search_queries.description: Used to initiate targeted campaigns to prune access for users who are no longer active in HR but still have active AD accounts.
Targets non-employee identities with administrative entitlements for high-frequency review.
